default.heading: Paint Match
default.body: Can you mix the perfect colour?

default.heading: Five Paints
default.body: You have red, yellow, blue, white, and black paint buckets. Adjust the sliders to mix your colour.

default.heading: Match the Target
default.body: The mystery colour is on the TV. Blend your paints to get as close as possible!

default.heading: Submit and Score
default.body: Lock in your mix before time runs out. Closest colour match wins the most points!
